verdict.grading_validated: PCMCI+ recovers supply's lagged structure exactly (temporal SHD 0, F1 1.0) — confirming the lagged answer-key + temporal scoring are correct end-to-end.
verdict.confounder_trap_is_method_specific: Unlike the cross-sectional crossover (where the whole standard toolbox falls for the hidden confounder), here only VARLiNGAM keeps the spurious leadtime~cost edge; PCMCI+, LPCMCI, and Granger do not. PCMCI+'s momentary-CI approach plus the autoregressive structure evidently screens off the latent here.
verdict.honest_caveat: This is n=1 (one temporal world). The cross-sectional crossover earned its claim at n=35; the temporal claim needs a temporal benchmark SET. Next (v0.9): teach the author to emit lagged worlds + temporal gates, then scale + re-run this crossover.
verdict.granger_note: Granger over-recovers spurious lagged links (F1 0.18) — expected; it tests predictive, not structural, causality.
